title: Customizable fields in Quotes and Invoices app
excerpt:
Hi monday.com team. 
Loving the Quotes & Invoices app on both work management and sales CRM. It would be absolutely great if fields on both “Bill From” and “Bill to” sections where customizable (e.g., add/remove/rename/r…

posts.author: juan.pyco (Juan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi monday.com team.

Loving the Quotes & Invoices app on both work management and sales CRM. It would be absolutely great if fields on both “Bill From” and “Bill to” sections where customizable (e.g., add/remove/rename/reorder fields)

Also, a discreet page-count “1/x” in the footer would be great. When exporting to .pdf the Quote/Invoice notes may extend the document into more than 1 page.

Warm regards from Colombia,

JP

posts.author: Lior_Marketplace (Lior Reiner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Juan,

My name is Lior and I’m from the app marketplace team.
Can you please share a link to the app page? So I’d be able to pass your feedback to our developer?

Thank you,
Lior

posts.author: juan.pyco (Juan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Lior,

Thank you for reaching out. I don’t think it’s an app itself, but it’s referred to as an “app” by monday.com. The element I am addressing is found in the “Item Views Center”. Please find below for your reference.

Don’t hesitate to contact me if I can be of help in further explaining the use case for improvement. I think it may be a minor fix, and a great improvement for the user

Regards,

JP
